notes: Operator policy is explicit and auditable. Evidence still appears separately in trade permissions.
Use this only for deliberate probes or emergency benches; do not hide research inside code.

guardrails: Tickets must be generated from today's A-book source.
fem_tickets.py must run with --proven-moo --fresh-only --no-bracket.
Only FEM >= 90 or T1-STRONG_LONG names can enter this route.
Opening-auction sleeve only: same-day tickets, before 09:30 ET, with bot-side freshness checks.
moo_ticket.reason: Gill requested MOO restored for the next session. Only proven A-Book MOO tickets may route; Upside Down Cow is benched.

guardrails: Same-day proven MOO radar manifest must be fresh.
No blind opening-auction inversion; RTH only after 09:35 ET.
Requires upper-gap tag and rejection on 5-minute bars.
Small route risk only: $35 source risk, max 5 entries/day.
Sub-$5 names must pass the sub-5 short probe/borrow proxy lane.
Review after expiry or at least 20 routed attempts.
upside_down_cow_short.reason: Gill requested Upside Down Cow turned off for the next session while long MOO is restored.

guardrails: Only State Lookup BEAR_REJECTION_CONFIRMED may use this route.
Do not route BEAR_REJECTION_PENDING through trapped_short.
Do not open gap_reject_short, live_fire_dump, dump_short, or broad short_universe from this override.
Existing borrowability, position cap, giveback guard, and broker safety checks still apply.
Review after expiry or after at least 20 routed attempts.
trapped_short.reason: Best actual short performer: State Lookup BEAR_REJECTION_CONFIRMED / trapped_short, +$765.37 over 68 closed slices, 60.3% win rate.

guardrails: Only the Short Genesis PAPER_LIVE scanner may use this route.
Do not open live_fire_dump, gap_reject_short, dump_short, or broad short_universe from this override.
Existing borrowability, price, liquidity, position cap, giveback guard, and broker safety checks still apply.
Review after expiry or after at least 20 routed attempts.
short_genesis.reason: Disabled after broader actual-fill review. Use trapped_short as the short execution route; keep short_genesis for tracking only until it proves itself.

guardrails: Existing fem_auto_trade surge micro sizing still applies.
Existing overhead-gap and clear-highway filters still apply.
Review after the expiry date or after at least 20 routed attempts.
surge_micro_scout.reason: Explicit tiny live probe for surge micro after overhead-gap, liquidity, stale-pullback, and sizing gates.

guardrails: Separate strategy id; do not merge with surge_micro_scout performance.
Bot caps this lane at 1 new entry per pass and 5 per day.
Only first-hour WATCH_ONLY rows with score, relative-volume, risk-on, and reachable target checks can enter.
Review after expiry or after at least 20 routed attempts.
Code-level surge watch sizing is $75 risk; broker/position/liquidity caps still control final shares.
surge_watch_probe.reason: Jul02: align route policy with fem_auto_trade $75 watch-probe risk so valid probes are not reduced to toy size.

guardrails: Only explicit gap_reject_short overhead-gap rejection fires may use this route.
Do not borrow permission from live_fire_dump, dump_short, short_universe, or trapped_short.
Require borrowability/shortability proxy, valid price, and current route lock registry.
Existing liquidity, position cap, giveback guard, daily P&L guard, and broker safety checks still apply.
Review after expiry or at least 20 routed attempts.
gap_reject_short.reason: Jul02: Gill requested the bear/gap-rejection short route live after repeated overhead-gap long failures; router evidence showed gap_reject_short candidates were blocked only by registry permission.
